subject: Tauros, a large bull-like Pokemon with curved horns, a thick neck mane, and three whipping tails, shown in a dynamic pose on high mountain terrain
description: A powerful bovine creature with a stocky brown-and-tan body, prominent curved horns, and a thick mane of dark fur framing the face and neck. Three tails stream behind it, wind-swept and active. The creature stands on rocky high-elevation terrain with pale sky visible behind it, suggesting a cliff or mountain setting. The pose is dynamic with weight forward, conveying strength and charge readiness. The warm brown of the creature's body contrasts against the cool pale sky.
foreground: Large brown bull Pokemon with curved horns, dark mane, and three wind-swept tails
background: Rocky high-elevation terrain under a pale overcast sky
emotion: aggressive, charging energy — head lowered, body tensed forward
